---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea to improve WPShadow
labels: enhancement
---

## Summary
- What problem does this solve?
- What's the proposed solution?

## Philosophy Check
- Helpful Neighbor (#1): Educates users, not sales
- Free as Possible (#2): No paywalls for local features
- Drive to KB (#5): Include KB article(s)
- Drive to Training (#6): Include training video(s)
- Ridiculously Good (#7): Intuitive, polished UX
- Show Value (#9): KPIs (time saved, issues fixed)
- Beyond Pure (#10): Consent-first for any data

## UX Details
- Mockups or description
- Clear undo/rollback if treatment

## Docs/KB
- KB article(s):
- Training video(s):

## Implementation Notes
- Areas affected (diagnostics/treatments/views/workflow)
- Risks and mitigations

## Acceptance Criteria
- Clear, testable outcomes
